extraction.one_line_summary: KADEN Kaden won with a 200m acceleration after being protected by Alpecin teammates who did zero work in the final 10km.
tactical_patterns: Alpecin preserved KADEN completely until 200m, zero accelerations final 10km while rivals burned matches positioning through traffic.
VAN POPPEL Danny had superior final 100m speed but boxed in, lost 3-5 pedal strokes creating gap to clear traffic.
Light headwind throughout discouraged large early breakaway, suppressed usual Vuelta aggression despite no categorized climbs.

rider_signals.VAN POPPEL Danny: positive: showed best raw speed in final 100m but tactical positioning deficit cost stage, sitting wrong wheels
rider_signals.ALAPHILIPPE Julian: negative: abandoned stage, significant blow to EVENEPOEL Remco losing road captain and world champion tactician
